meta.title: About Us | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Eagle Logistics is a trusted logistics mediation center connecting India to the world since 2010.

hero.title: Connecting India to the World Since 2010
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for domestic and international courier services — delivering happiness across borders.

story.title: Who We Are
story.body: Eagle Logistics is a logistics mediation center — not a single fleet operator. We sit at the center of a trusted partner network, comparing couriers so you get the best rate and route for every shipment.

story.title: Our Mission
story.body: To simplify shipping for individuals and businesses by comparing multiple courier vendors, selecting the best option, and providing one hub for drop-off, pricing, and support.

story.title: Why Aggregator?
story.body: Shippers shouldn't need five tabs open to compare prices. Eagle does the comparison for you — one drop-off, multiple partners, best price. That's our promise.

cta.title: Ready to ship smarter?
cta.subtitle: Calculate your cost or talk to our team on WhatsApp.
